title: National Silver Academy
text:
National Silver Academy - SupportGoWhere
National Silver Academy
Share link
A learning academy that offers learning opportunities, short-term courses and programmes for seniors.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Encourage lifelong learning amongst seniors
Collapse all sections
About this support

Administered by the Council for Third Age (under the Agency for Integrated Care) to offer subsidised learning opportunities for seniors aged 50 and above

Formed by a network of post-secondary education institutions (PSEIs) and community-based organisations offering a wide range of learning opportunities located all around Singapore

Who is this for?

For short courses offered by PSEIs, only Singaporeans aged 50 and above will receive a subsidy of up to 50% off course fees

For courses run by community-based organisations, Singaporeans and PRs aged 50 and above will receive a subsidy of up to 80% off course fees

How to apply?

Please refer to each course listing here for the application process

Where can I find help?

View more details

Hotline: 1800-650-6060
Operating hours: 

Mon – Fri: 8:30 am – 8:30 pm
Sat: 8:30 am – 4.00 pm

(including Public Holidays)

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Submit an enquiry

5 Maxwell Road
#10-00 Tower Block
MND Complex
Singapore 069110
